title: LiveAgentSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents an organization’s Chat settings, such as whether Chat is enabled. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

enableChatFindOrCreateEnable.description: Indicates whether the findOrCreate method of the Chat API is enabled for agents (true) or not (false). Available in API version 53.0 and later.

enableLiveAgent.description: Indicates whether Chat is enabled (true) or not (false).

enableQuickTextEnabled.description: Indicates whether Quick Text is enabled (true) or not (false).

priority.description: Indicates the priority level of a Chat.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="LiveAgentSettings">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="enableChatFindOrCreateEnable" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableLiveAgent" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableQuickTextEnabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: This is a sample Chat settings file.
